title: Iron Age Begins
description: Iron tools and weapons spread across parts of Eurasia after the Bronze Age.

title: Neo-Assyrian Empire Rises
description: Assyria becomes one of the first great military empires of the Iron Age.

title: Athenian Democracy
description: Athens develops one of the earliest known systems of direct democracy.

title: Alexander's Conquests
description: Alexander the Great builds an empire stretching from Greece to India.

title: Qin Unifies China
description: Qin Shi Huang unifies the Warring States into China's first imperial dynasty.

title: Roman Empire Begins
description: Octavian becomes Augustus, marking the start of the Roman Empire.
